hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.rs|*Cargo.toml) if ! out=$(cargo fmt --check 2>&1); then echo "cargo fmt --check failed:" >&2; echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; fi; if ! out=$(cargo clippy --all-targets --quiet -- -D warnings 2>&1); then echo "cargo clippy (pedantic) failed:" >&2; echo "$out" | tail -50 >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac
